chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: A permit issued under this subchapter shall specify the time in which movement authorized by the permit is allowed.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.236 — Time of Movement

A permit issued under this subchapter shall specify the time in which movement authorized by the permit is allowed.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter shall specify the time in which movement authorized by the permit is allowed.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 786, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.
